Counts readable contents stored inside shulker boxes, bundles, and similar item-stack components.
config.chest_count_overlay.enabled.descr: Shows the item count overlay for supported chest-like containers.
config.chest_count_overlay.keybinds.desc: Opens Minecraft's keybind screen. Change the Chest Count Overlay toggle there.
config.chest_count_overlay.placement.des: Chooses which side of the vanilla container UI the overlay uses.
config.chest_count_overlay.show_when_emp: Shows the toggle tab even when the opened supported container has no counted items.
config.chest_count_overlay.title: Chest Count Overlay
